title: Judgment as Intuition Authority Assignment
one_sentence: This module defines judgment as the operation that assigns editable authority to intuition markers.

core_compression.authority: A = priority weight or gating rule assigned to I
core_compression.editability: ability to revise A(I) under new evidence or constraints without runaway cost
core_compression.authority_debt: accumulated cost of misassigned authority that increases revision resistance over time

IAD_loop: Re-entry: next state biased by r*
negative_constraints: Do not treat intuition as automatically authoritative.
Classify authority assignment and editability dynamics only.
